name: Chris McDaniel
subject: Establishment picks a Democrat?!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
I’m incredibly disappointed and hope you are too, to learn of the appointment of a former Democrat to fill the temporary vacancy created by Republican Senator Thad Cochran's retirement. Cindy Hyde-Smith served in the Mississippi Senate as a Democrat. She ran as a Democrat. She voted as a Democrat.

Peter,

I’m incredibly disappointed and hope you are too, to learn of the appointment of a former Democrat to fill the temporary vacancy created by Republican Senator Thad Cochran's retirement.

Cindy Hyde-Smith served in the Mississippi Senate as a Democrat. She ran as a Democrat. She voted as a Democrat.

The last thing that the state of Mississippi needs is another Democrat.

Yet Mitch McConnell and the Washington establishment have decided that they know what’s best for Mississippi again. They seem unable to learn the lesson that when they meddle in primaries, Republicans end up losing.

Let’s show Mitch McConnell and the establishment in Washington that the people of Mississippi are tired of them. Chip in to my campaign today and let’s send a message that we know what’s best for Mississippi! [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180321_Hyde&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180321_Hyde]

Chip in $10 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180321_Hyde&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180321_Hyde]

Chip in $15 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180321_Hyde&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180321_Hyde]

Chip in $25 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180321_Hyde&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180321_Hyde]

Chip in $50 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180321_Hyde&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180321_Hyde]

Chip in other amount [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180321_Hyde&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180321_Hyde]

Mississippi voters will have a clear choice in November for the open seat for United States Senate. They can choose from among the Democratic candidates hand-picked by the establishment, or they can vote for a lifelong conservative Republican.

Mississippi needs to send a conservative to Washington to drain the swamp. If I’m elected, that is exactly what I intend to do.

Thank you,

Chris

name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2692703ee1f38d5fb5e5e5bbf24214f673ed97d58ae8bbc4692d4d7c4f26df194d08998cacad34c36d3ff21dc146c150ff9ca36e9828c14c
Modern American women succeed under Republican economic policies

- The Hill

“Evidence that policies focused on growth and economic mobility greatly improve the lives of women is everywhere,” fiscal policy expert Mattie Duppler writes in The Hill. Duppler highlights how the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act signed by President Donald J. Trump has improved the landscape for women, whether they are “workers, or bosses, or stay-at-home moms.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=2692703ee1f38d5f4c0ce287380ee487fb9505e2f434e791bebfd783097988c617f20fd468667bfdb49c3c050d10fc7568f17afceb184418

Federal prosecutors told to seek death penalty in drug cases

- Reuters

“U.S. Attorney General Jeff Sessions instructed federal prosecutors on Wednesday to seek the death penalty in drug-related cases whenever it is ‘appropriate,’ saying the Justice Department must boost efforts to counter America’s epidemic of opioid abuse,” Reuters reports. The Attorney General’s remarks came after President Trump announced a detailed plan on the opioid crisis earlier this week.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=23b9a370c7e93e0f09973d3be5dfeeade70b2f0b2fa32b08a783963e9963f2fe3d18894be6173d06b8fde29ff0288723deb0bf2a6529d97c
Daily Signal exclusive: Ivanka Trump on jobs, millennials, and #MeToo

- The Daily Signal

Senior leaders from across the Administration—including President Trump himself—fielded a range of questions Thursday at Generation Next, a White House forum for millennials. Senior Adviser Ivanka Trump sat down with The Daily Signal for a Q&A, explaining why she thinks “this is a moment of incredible opportunity” for women in America.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=23b9a370c7e93e0f476875054aa2e321d4fac9754e7a2c92d680016be68837fbac8acacd401d36c14b89326843f018de66d9deafacdeb716

AIDS researcher Robert R. Redfield named to lead the C.D.C.

- The New York Times

On Wednesday, the Trump Administration tapped Dr. Robert R. Redfield, cofounder of the Institute for Human Virology, to lead the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention. Dr. Redfield has “decades of science and clinical work – especially in the field of H.I.V./AIDS.” Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar called Dr. Redfield “peerless” in his depth of experience.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=23b9a370c7e93e0fc4cedac6ca642c9213a59a1edc1e9e4b523ce0d646d70ccffd9a9e6fc485d8067720fdd5b2a10d130ed1595523db26fe
Senators announce legislation to charge fentanyl pushers more harshly

- The Washington Free Beacon

“Trump called for the use of the death penalty in certain drug-trafficking related cases as part of the announcement on Monday of his administration's strategy for combatting the opioid epidemic,” Charles Fain Lehman reports. By Thursday, five Republican lawmakers had announced a new bill that would toughen the charges facing dealers who traffic in fentanyl, a deadly synthetic opioid.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=23b9a370c7e93e0f57ca91598811f261f5b8689d0c5d219402f3234c277047442a1fe7d7a3b952a1fd92cce5a8e20c591f5da43793d1d24a
House passes bill that would give patients access to experimental drugs

- The New York Times

“The House, spurred on by President Trump, passed a bill on Wednesday that would give patients with terminal illnesses a right to try unproven experimental treatments,” Robert Pear reports. Proponents of the bill say it will “give dying patients a chance to obtain potentially helpful prescription drugs without waiting for the completion of clinical trials.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8931deaf63742c8850f99a4da5b88e9fb9ab5dbc473f2bb02380405b3b711b28b791dc4c42c36ad49865185e5cf25606518241bf19b7b26
Trump takes part in millennial forum

- USA Today

On Thursday, President Trump participated in a Q&A with conservative advocate Charlie Kirk at the White House’s Generation Next forum. Their conversation covered taxes, trade policy, and what advice the President would give to a 25-year-old Donald Trump today.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8931deaf63742c83d6dc257cdf13218890cd5ef4bd9f564009c3cc83d92fc6247ed84252ece44a53cbfdc1dabbcaf22009c6ec2eda591e3
5 principles for infrastructure success

- The Washington Times

“Investment in infrastructure is coming at just the right time for America,” Gov. Pete Ricketts (R-NE) writes this week. “Over the past year, the Trump administration has listened to states while developing policy proposals.” Gov. Ricketts joined President Trump at the White House when the President unveiled his plan for rebuilding American infrastructure last month.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8931deaf63742c8f474b2e82f1e20c4b50165c26d592cbe63da0dc3a6a66a7dd7eff8d1bd15310c8174e723318e4df82e8578e22a8e884a
Obama EPA Administrators spent eight times more than Pruitt on international travel

- The Washington Free Beacon

Travel for President Obama’s EPA Administrators cost taxpayers roughly $1 million, The Washington Free Beacon reports. “The double-standard couldn't be more clear: Under Barack Obama's EPA the media chose not to report on expenditures to protect the EPA administrator for international travel or the costs of their trips," EPA Spokesman Jahan Wilcox said.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8931deaf63742c8ff4743b1bc217b60fdd453eccd3a935cf705965419256f59a3c5da5a04431390625b0a86df77ba8976b62134a62ff6f1
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d8931deaf63742c894895e56603e3a78e631cfd1ef5310d9c54d60173b1157ed1a8fc73628f8c63ae7bfd17168541272409aa74e171da83d
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4265036d3dc58850771a9e8fe3a2587162847716d4b6634680e2098f04ca660240c528a2b8a167b22015254b7fcd9dc5dbf76d3b7304e49f1
Unsubscribe

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I need your help to take on the gun lobby
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Congress will only act when they realize they have more to fear from all of us standing together than the gun lobby.
---
Today we are giving the gun lobby something to be worried about, Derek.

At more than 800 events, our movement is taking a powerful stand against gun violence. We're showing that we will not accept horrific acts of violence as routine -- and if Congress won't act, then American voters will.

We can end the cycle of gun violence -- but it will only happen if we continue organizing to take on the gun lobby. So I am asking you today:

**Split a $3 donation between Giffords PAC and the DNC to defeat the gun lobby in November. It's time to elect candidates who will make our communities safer from gun violence.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522536/4067b0a/51971aab0/7e4bb169/2717773812/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&source=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&refcode=em_20180324_gg_nd_a")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522536/4067b0a/51971aab0/7e4bb176/2717773812/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&source=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&refcode=em_20180324_gg_nd_a")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522536/4067b0a/51971aab0/7e4bb177/2717773812/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&source=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&refcode=em_20180324_gg_nd_a")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522536/4067b0a/51971aab0/7e4bb174/2717773812/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&source=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&refcode=em_20180324_gg_nd_a")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522536/4067b0a/51971aab0/7e4bb175/2717773812/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&source=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&refcode=em_20180324_gg_nd_a")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522536/4067b0a/51971aab0/7e4bb172/2717773812/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&source=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&refcode=em_20180324_gg_nd_a")
** The gun lobby is fully committed to defending their deadly agenda, no matter what the cost. They are prepared to spend tens of millions of dollars this year -- all to elect candidates who will stall efforts on gun violence prevention legislation.

This year we must match their commitment with our own. We must remember that we are not hopeless in the fight to end gun violence -- and our collective power at marches nationwide today proves that.

**If our current leaders do not have the courage to act on gun violence, then it's up to us to elect candidates who will.**

I am going to work tirelessly this year to defeat politicians who are funded by the gun lobby -- and today I am counting on you to join me.

**[Split a $3 donation between Giffords PAC and the DNC today. Your contribution will help end gun violence and save lives.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522536/4067b0a/51971aab0/7e4bb173/2717773812/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-defeat-the-gun-lobby?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Split+a+if+consinConsGroup29378+nother+e&utm_campaign=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&source=em_20180324_gg_nd_a&refcode=em_20180324_gg_nd_a")**

All my best,

Gabby Giffords

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. clean_body: Congress will only act when they realize they have more to fear from all of us standing together than the gun lobby. Today we are giving the gun lobby something to be worried about, Derek. At more than 800 events, our movement is taking a powerful stand against gun violence. We're showing that we will not accept horrific acts of violence as routine -- and if Congress won't act, then American voters will. We can end the cycle of gun violence -- but it will only happen if we continue organizing to take on the gun lobby. So I am asking you today: Split a $3 donation between Giffords PAC and the DNC to defeat the gun lobby in November. It's time to elect candidates who will make our communities safer from gun violence. "" "" "" "" "" "" The gun lobby is fully committed to defending their deadly agenda, no matter what the cost. They are prepared to spend tens of millions of dollars this year -- all to elect candidates who will stall efforts on gun violence prevention legislation. This year we must match their commitment with our own. We must remember that we are not hopeless in the fight to end gun violence -- and our collective power at marches nationwide today proves that. If our current leaders do not have the courage to act on gun violence, then it's up to us to elect candidates who will. I am going to work tirelessly this year to defeat politicians who are funded by the gun lobby -- and today I am counting on you to join me. "" All my best, Gabby Giffords Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Demand action to reduce gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Friends, In the days after the tragic shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School, the students grieved. They mourned lost friends. They consoled each other and the families of those who died. But they did something else, too. They decided they'd had enough. Too many children in America know the sound of gunshots ringing through the halls of their school. Too many communities know the pain of losing students, teachers, and friends. So the students from Stoneman Douglas decided to channel their grief into action. They took to social media. They got together with one another and with groups of concerned citizens, just like them. Just one week after the tragedy they suffered, those students marched in the state capital of Tallahassee to demand action. Now, they're organizing the March for Our Lives in Washington, D.C., set to take place this Saturday. The students of Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School aren't just seizing a moment. They're starting a movement. **And today I'm asking you to lend your voice to all of theirs.** [_**We need stronger common-sense gun safety measures in this country, and we need them before another community suffers as Parkland has. Add your name to demand Congress take steps to reduce gun violence.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fe1/622b7b5b/19f1ed17/307b8df2/3803613427/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180325") | | | [Add Your Voice](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fe1/622b7b5b/19f1ed17/307b8df2/3803613427/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180325")
---
The simple truth is we will not be able to prevent every tragedy. But there are things we can do. We can ban assault weapons and magazines. We can strengthen background checks. We can do more to keep firearms out of the hands of mentally ill individuals. We can allow gun violence to be studied as the epidemic it is.
And we can do all those things before one more gunshot chases a student down a hallway.
I hope you'll add your voice to mine. [_**Demand Congress take action against gun violence.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fe1/622b7b5b/19f1ed17/307b8df2/3803613427/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180325")
Thank you.
Debbie

|
---

Hello,
Today, thousands (if not millions) of people are following the lead of Parkland, Florida high school students at the March for Our Lives.
They're marching to demand common sense gun safety, and they're marching to demand that we stop putting the NRA before our kids.
**They 're marching to demand that Congress do better.**
[**If you can 't attend a march today (or even if you are able to), please add your name to support those marching and call on Republicans in Congress to stop kowtowing to the gun lobby and pass legislation that keeps our communities safe from gun violence.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf36/2a380d31/559f846/f1e159/2932373010/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180324_MarchForOurLives?source=e20180323_gunsafety_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thoughts and prayers are not sufficient. Allowing the conversation about gun safety to fall out of the news cycle is not acceptable.
We need to hold Congress's feet to the fire until families can send their children to school without the fear that they may not come home.
[**Sign the petition to hold Congress accountable for its failure to pass gun safety measures, and call on Republicans to stop putting the NRA ahead of children 's lives.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf36/2a380d31/559f846/f1e159/2932373010/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180324_MarchForOurLives?source=e20180323_gunsafety_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")

| | Peter --

Joe's Republican opponents have made no secret of their love for Betsy DeVos. Congressman Rokita just called her a "valuable partner." And Congressman Messer worked for organizations that received a _million_ dollars from her to lobby for her agenda in Indiana.

But Messer and Rokita seem to be forgetting one thing -- DeVos is _terrible_ for Hoosiers. She's all but opposed to supporting public education. In her catastrophic _60 Minutes_ interview, she even spoke out **against** investing in school buildings and school systems!

Hoosiers deserve a senator who will stand up for what we need -- not what the big donors need. That's expanding access to early childhood education, improving our public schools, and reducing federal student loan debt. **And if Indiana 's GOP Senate candidates can't stand up to Betsy DeVos, will they be able to stand up for Hoosiers?**
